steps.title: Decode the mathematical notation in context
steps.content: The variable $x$ represents years after the end of 1959, so $x = 5$ corresponds to the end of 1964. The function $f(x)$ models account value in dollars. Therefore, $f(5) \approx 265$ means the account value is approximately 265 dollars at the end of 1964.

steps.title: Identify the matching choice
steps.content: Choice D — The value of the bank account is estimated to be approximately 265 dollars at the end of 1964. states: The value of the bank account is estimated to be approximately 265 dollars at the end of 1964. This is exactly our interpretation. That matches Choice D — The value of the bank account is estimated to be approximately 265 dollars at the end of 1964..
